title: Cool End for Hypixel Skyblock
description: Cool End Resourse Pack for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
This resource pack make end more Cool in Hypixel Skyblock.

**[FIRMAMENT](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) is Required**

Current Textures changes:

- Sandstone Slab -> End Stone Slab
- Sandstone Stairs -> End Stone Stairs
- Mushroom Blocks -> End Granite
- Birch Planks -> End Diorite
- Light Blue Wool -> Solid Amethyst
- Purple Wool Carpet -> Purple Amethyst Carpet
- Magenta Wool Carpet -> Magenta Amethyst Carpet
- Purple Glass -> Purple Amethyst
- Magenta Glass -> Magenta Amethyst

[Check my NEW pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arkudiis-detailed-hypixel-skyblock) for Hypixel Skyblock!
